summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Abacus FCF Small Cap Leaders ETF (ABLS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Abacus FCF Small Cap Leaders index. The fund is passively managed, seeking to provide exposure to a narrow portfolio of US small-cap stocks with strong quality earnings, profitability, and cash flow-based financial strength. ABLS was launched on Feb 18, 2025 and is issued by Abacus.
infoTable: Abacus FCF Small Cap Leaders Index

holdings.infoBox: ABLS is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Argan stock at 10.92%, Enova International at 5.75%, Oscar Health at 5.31%, Artisan Partners Asset Management at 4.33%, and Collegium Pharmaceutical at 4.31%.
